posts.author: rhc (HELLMANN)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We are 10 users in our team. We are constantly re-ordering the left hand side boards order, (on a daily basis), because someone changes the order without meaning to.

What are you trying to achieve

I would LOVE to be able to lock this order once and for all, and get to decide who can change the order (admin user) and who doesn’t
